heading: Create Snapshot Export Job
body:
To export one Atlas backup snapshot to an AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) Bucket,
Azure Blob Storage Container, or Google Cloud Storage bucket, send a `POST` request
to the Cloud Backups [endpoint](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-creategroupclusterbackupexport) with the ID of the snapshot to
export and the ID of the AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) Bucket, Azure Blob Storage Container,
or Google Cloud Storage bucket.
